name: github-copilot-llm-gateway
description: Connect GitHub Copilot to open-source models via vLLM or any OpenAI-compatible server

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent to the inference server. Leave blank for unauthenticated local servers (vLLM, Ollama, llama.cpp). Stored by VS Code; takes precedence over the 'Configure Server' command's SecretStorage entry.

apiKey.title: API Key 2
apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent to inference server 2.

apiKey.title: API Key 3
apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent to inference server 3.

apiKey.title: API Key 4
apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent to inference server 4.

apiKey.title: API Key 5
apiKey.description: Optional bearer token sent to inference server 5.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.serverUrl.description: Inference server URL (OpenAI API compatible endpoint) (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.apiKey.description: Deprecated. Use the 'Configure Server' command to store the API key. (Provider 1)
github.copilot.llm-gateway.apiKey.deprecationMessage: API keys are now stored in VS Code's secret storage.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.defaultMaxTok.description: Fallback context window size (input tokens) when the server does not report it (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.defaultMaxOut.description: Fallback maximum output tokens when the server does not report context size (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.enableImageIn.description: Enable image input capability for models that support multimodal requests (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.enableToolCal.description: Enable tool calling capability for models (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.parallelToolC.description: Allow model to call multiple tools in parallel (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.agentTemperat.description: Temperature for agent/tool calling mode (lower = more consistent tool call formatting). (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.verboseLoggin.description: When enabled, the full chat request body is written to the output channel. (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.customHeaders.description: Deprecated. Use the 'Edit Custom Headers' command. (Provider 1)
github.copilot.llm-gateway.customHeaders.deprecationMessage: Custom headers are now stored in VS Code's secret storage.

github.copilot.llm-gateway.extraModelOpt.description: Extra parameters merged into the chat-completions request body. (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.thinkingEffor.description: Default reasoning/thinking effort (e.g. low, medium, high) for reasoning models. (Provider 1)

github.copilot.llm-gateway.customModels.description: Optional list of custom model IDs to expose if the server does not support the models endpoint. (Provider 1)
